summary: QA re-review accepts M3-SUCCESSION-STATE-MACHINE-001 after the R3 dead/incapacitated invariant repair. The previous QA blocker is resolved: sim.record-character-status rejects incapacitating an already-dead character without mutating the world, death normalizes incapacitated=false, incapacity vacates active office/enfeoffment holdings and creates an incapacity succession trigger, and validateWorldStateV0 reports stable invalid-schema paths for dead-and-incapacitated characters plus unavailable active office/enfeoffment holders. Required validation commands pass, R3 handoffs validate, deterministic hashes match, and changed-path scope remains within the task allowlist with no client/UI/save/content/full-war/full-diplomacy drift.

tests_run.result: Worktree shows task-scoped protocol/sim-core/test edits, allowed project coordination state files, prior QA/systems/writer handoffs, R3 route evidence, and untracked succession test/handoff artifacts.

tests_run.result: Validated writer REVIEW, systems REQUEST_CHANGES, writer R2 REVIEW, systems R2 ACCEPT, QA REQUEST_CHANGES, writer R3 REVIEW, and systems R3 ACCEPT handoff JSON files.

tests_run.result: Task JSON parse/shape OK: id M3-SUCCESSION-STATE-MACHINE-001, status REVIEW, 6 acceptance criteria, 9 required tests.

No random or real-time API matches found in reviewed sim-core/protocol/test paths.

Node and worker-compatible hashes matched: hello 61e0ba1c, command/query d275faa4, save/load 28074edd; save/load byte length 10920.
Architecture boundaries passed; deterministic canaries matched; root Vitest 22 files / 134 tests passed; web Vitest 1 file / 3 tests passed.

tests_run.result: Focused R3 invariant regression passed: 2 tests passed, 8 skipped.

tests_run.result: Focused dead-character command/authority/relationship regression passed: 1 test passed, 9 skipped.

Confirmed incapacity command is accepted for an alive ruler, vacates office/enfeoffment holdings, creates an incapacity trigger, and validates cleanly; confirmed dead-then-incapacitated command is rejected with succession-state-invalid and unchanged state hash; confirmed malformed unavailable holder state reports invalid-schema paths for character incapacitated, office holder, and enfeoffment holder.

tests_run.command: Get-Content/rg route evidence for QA->writer R3, lead->systems R3, systems R3->QA, thread registry, goal-mode state, and model-routing state
tests_run.result: Route/thread evidence matches simulation_engineer 019efdf7-e658-7e30-8486-e496b0de4b7f, systems_architect 019efe09-de21-7e71-9bcd-5540fdc0f666, and qa_reviewer 019efe1c-11c0-7701-9175-1d52e88650a1.

decisions: Accept the R3 fix because the previously reproduced dead-then-incapacitated command path now rejects before mutation and preserves the state hash.

Accept the world-state validation repair because unavailable active office and enfeoffment holders now produce stable semantic invalid-schema paths, while normal death and incapacity command paths vacate those holdings.

The full M3 minimal succession acceptance criteria are supported: death/incapacity state, candidate formation, explicit serializable support sources, peaceful/disputed resolution, command-driven authority, deterministic tie-breakers, policy persistence, and dead-character command/relationship rejection are covered by implementation and tests.

No scope drift was found into client UI, web/desktop, save-format, content schema/runtime/source, formal historical dynasty data, full diplomacy, full civil war, event narrative systems, random/time APIs, or Node IO authority.
Route to lead_orchestrator for final task acceptance/integration; do not dispatch further writer work for this task from QA.
risks: M3 runtime save/load support remains intentionally deferred to M3-SAVE-RUNTIME-001; current save/runtime canaries still pass and existing M3 save behavior is not expanded by this task.
Succession support weights and thresholds remain M3 scaffold constants, not final dynasty law, diplomacy, civil-war, or historical-content rules.

Hand-mutated malformed worlds may still include hash-mismatch diagnostics in addition to structured semantic errors; QA accepts this because the required stable invariant paths are present before final rejection.
requested_action: Lead orchestrator should perform final integration/acceptance handling for M3-SUCCESSION-STATE-MACHINE-001. No further simulation_engineer changes are requested by QA.
